## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## How I tested it

<!-- Commands run, manual steps, screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] I manually exercised the affected surface (`npm run dev` and/or `npm run harness`)
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or personal data (`.env.local`, `.gondola/`) are committed
- [ ] I removed temporary logging / debug instrumentation
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
